mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT sm.menu_code FROM t_sys_menu sm INNER JOIN t_sys_role_menu srm ON sm.id = srm.menu_id INNER JOIN t_sys_user_role sur ON srm.role_id = sur.role_id WHERE sur.user_id = #{userId} AND sm.status = 1 AND sm.menu_code IS NOT NULL

SELECT DISTINCT sm.* FROM t_sys_menu sm INNER JOIN t_sys_role_menu srm ON sm.id = srm.menu_id INNER JOIN t_sys_user_role sur ON srm.role_id = sur.role_id WHERE sur.user_id = #{userId} AND sm.status = 1 ORDER BY sm.sort_order ASC
SELECT * FROM t_sys_menu WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC
